name: mappa-eventi-viterbo
description: Project Atlas — mappa eventi per Viterbo e provincia

scripts.build: npm run build -w @atlas/core && npm run build -w @atlas/supabase-client && npm run build -w @atlas/collector && npm run build -w @atlas/web && npm run build -w @atlas/admin
scripts.collect: npm run build -w @atlas/collector && npm run collect -w @atlas/collector
scripts.import:events: npm run build -w @atlas/collector && npm run import:events -w @atlas/collector
scripts.report:gap: npm run build -w @atlas/collector && npm run report:gap -w @atlas/collector
scripts.report:compare: npm run build -w @atlas/collector && npm run report:compare -w @atlas/collector
scripts.fix:coords: npm run build -w @atlas/collector && npm run fix:coords -w @atlas/collector
scripts.report:locate: npm run build -w @atlas/collector && npm run report:locate -w @atlas/collector
scripts.report:duplicates: npm run build -w @atlas/collector && npm run report:duplicates -w @atlas/collector
scripts.fix:duplicates: npm run build -w @atlas/collector && npm run fix:duplicates -w @atlas/collector
scripts.fix:categories: npm run build -w @atlas/collector && npm run fix:categories -w @atlas/collector
scripts.fix:titles: npm run build -w @atlas/collector && npm run fix:titles -w @atlas/collector
scripts.report:categories: npm run build -w @atlas/collector && npm run report:categories -w @atlas/collector
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @atlas/core && npm run typecheck -w @atlas/supabase-client && npm run typecheck -w @atlas/collector && npm run typecheck -w @atlas/web && npm run typecheck -w @atlas/admin
